calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer R. Snyder, Esq. T:510.573.1043, appearing specially for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by the judgment debtor, CLAIMANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR DEBORAH AGUILAR-MONTENEGRO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is DENIED. The levying officer is directed to withhold $250.00 per pay period as payment for the judgment.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
